items.detail: Throughout 2026, planned improvement work will take place across the tram network. We’re investing almost £150m through to 2027 on maintenance, upgrades and improvements. This includes crucial work to fix and replace older tram tracks in the city centre. Here you’ll find everything you need to help plan your journey when we have to close tram stops and change tram services. We’ll make sure you can get from A to B as smoothly as possible: by changing trams, using replacement bus services, or following a signposted walking route. Thanks for bearing with us as we work to make your tram network as reliable as possible. Please plan ahead and allow plenty of time for your journey on dates where work is taking place. Follow us on X Sign up to the Find out more about planned works and what they mean for your journey below. Jump to:

items.title: Tram improvement works and disruptions

items.detail: On Sunday 22 March, improvement works will take place on the Rochdale line. A bus replacement service will operate between the affected stops. On Sunday 29 March, A bus replacement service will operate between Victoria - Piccadilly until 11am.
items.ticker_text: Works starting in March: On Sunday 22 March, improvement works will take place on the Rochdale line. A bus replacement service will operate between the affected stops. On Sunday 29 March, A bus replacement service will operate between Victoria - Piccadilly until 11am.
items.title: Works starting in March

items.detail: From Friday 3 to Monday 6 April, tram improvement works will take place at Deansgate-Castlefield and Trafford Bar. During this time track renewal works will also take place between Timperley and Stretford, allowing us to reduce further closures of the Altrincham line. The following changes will be in place across the network: Replacement buses will operate between the affected stops. Tram services will resume as normal from start of service on Tuesday 7 April. On Saturday 11 and Sunday 12 April, due to track repair works, A replacement bus service will operate between the affected stops. On Saturday 25 and Sunday 26 April, Bus replacement services between Piccadilly Gardens - Ashton-under-Lyne throughout the day to help customers continue their journey. On Sunday 26 April, A bus replacement service will operate between Victoria - Piccadilly until 11am.

items.title: Works starting in May

items.detail: Bus replacement services will operate Victoria - Piccadilly, and Victoria - Rochdale Town Centre during the affected times. From Saturday 16 to Friday 29 May, improvement works will take place on the Rochdale line. During this time, Tram services to East Didsbury will start from Exchange Square, and tram services from the Trafford Centre will operate to Crumpsall via Market Street. A bus replacement service will operate between Victoria and Rochdale Town Centre. From Monday 25 to Friday 29 May, improvement works will take place at Piccadilly Gardens.
